title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 29 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 29 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 29 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 29/05/2024
DCE iron ore futures fall today, the main contract closed 891. an decrease of 1.11% throughout the day; Some tradersship according to market conditions; Some steel procurement more cautious, the continuation of a small number of multi-frequency procurement strategy. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
